priority_indicators.label: ANC screened for high blood pressure
HIV-tested and screened for anaemia and high blood pressure
priority_indicators.note: Composite: requires same person to have HIV test AND anaemia screening AND BP screening in same encounter. Needs custom cross-concept logic.

priority_indicators.label: Quality intrapartum care and management of complications according to guidelines
priority_indicators.note: Composite: PPH, Sepsis, PET/ET, Obstructed labour all managed per protocol. Requires custom composite logic across multiple obs.

priority_indicators.label: Eligible women with pre-term labour who received antenatal corticosteroids
Women in labour who received prophylactic azithromycin
Women with early-detected PPH who received the WHO treatment bundle
Skilled delivery attendance
priority_indicators.note: Calculated from delivery staff cadre recorded in labour encounter. Current data only captures skilled cadres.

priority_indicators.label: ANC screened for anaemia
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator from the Malawi pathway document. Current parquet does not yet expose the anaemia screening concept required for calculation.

priority_indicators.label: ANC screened for infection
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. Infection screening concept is not yet available in the current parquet in a directly calculable form.

priority_indicators.label: ANC screened for high blood pressure
priority_indicators.note: Tracked from ANC clients with blood-pressure vitals recorded in the current parquet.

priority_indicators.label: HIV-tested and screened for anaemia and high blood pressure
priority_indicators.note: Composite official indicator. Requires ANC-linked HIV testing plus anaemia and blood-pressure screening concepts in the same care flow.

priority_indicators.label: POCUS with gestational age
priority_indicators.note: Tracked with a proxy numerator for gestational age recorded by ultrasound in ANC.

priority_indicators.label: Quality intrapartum care and management of complications according to guidelines
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. Requires guideline-based composite logic across PPH, sepsis, PET/ET and obstructed labour management.

priority_indicators.label: Digital intrapartum monitoring in labour
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. Digital intrapartum monitoring concept is not yet available in the current parquet.

priority_indicators.label: Eligible women with pre-term labour who received antenatal corticosteroids
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. Eligibility and corticosteroid administration concepts are not yet available as stable report filters.

priority_indicators.label: Women in labour who received prophylactic azithromycin
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. Azithromycin administration is not yet represented as a labour-specific prophylaxis concept in the parquet.

priority_indicators.label: Women with early-detected PPH who received the WHO treatment bundle
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. Early detection and treatment-bundle concepts for PPH are not yet available in a calculable form.

priority_indicators.label: PNC mothers within 48 hours

numerator_filters.value2: Up to 48 hrs or before discharge

priority_indicators.note: Operational PNC indicator retained so PNC remains visible in current Malawi MNID reporting.

priority_indicators.label: Mother alive at PNC review
priority_indicators.note: Operational PNC status indicator available in the new parquet.

priority_indicators.label: Baby alive at PNC review
priority_indicators.note: Operational PNC newborn outcome indicator available in the new parquet.

priority_indicators.label: BCG vaccination coverage
priority_indicators.note: Operational PNC immunisation indicator available in the new parquet.

priority_indicators.label: ANC 2+ tetanus doses
priority_indicators.note: Operational ANC priority retained from MNH report indicators.

priority_indicators.label: Pregnancy planned
priority_indicators.note: Operational ANC priority retained from refactored report indicators.

priority_indicators.label: Danger signs assessed
priority_indicators.note: Operational ANC priority retained from refactored report indicators.

priority_indicators.label: Facility deliveries
priority_indicators.note: Operational labour priority retained from MNH report indicators.

priority_indicators.label: Vitamin K given at birth
priority_indicators.note: Operational labour priority retained from refactored report indicators.

priority_indicators.label: Breastfeeding in first hour
priority_indicators.note: Operational labour/newborn transition indicator retained from refactored report indicators.

priority_indicators.label: Neonatal resuscitation (eligible babies)
priority_indicators.note: Eligibility and intervention concepts do not align reliably in current neonatal data; numerator exceeds denominator. Needs source-data linkage cleanup before tracking.

priority_indicators.label: Eligible preterm and low birth-weight babies who receive iKMC
Babies between 1000-1499g who receive prophylactic CPAP
Eligible babies between 1500 and 1999g who receive CPAP
priority_indicators.note: Requires birth weight field to separate 1500-1999g cohort from 1000-1499g. Birth weight not yet captured as a distinct filterable concept.

priority_indicators.label: Babies with clinical jaundice who receive phototherapy
Babies with suspected sepsis who receive parenteral antibiotics
Babies not hypothermic on admission to the neonatal unit
Babies not hypothermic at any time in the neonatal unit
priority_indicators.note: Longitudinal: requires all temperature readings within NNU stay to be in normal range. Needs time-series logic not yet supported.

priority_indicators.label: Eligible babies who received neonatal resuscitation
priority_indicators.note: Tracked with the available resuscitation-method denominator pending an eligibility-specific source field.

priority_indicators.label: Eligible preterm and low birth-weight babies who receive iKMC
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. iKMC initiation concept is not yet available in the current parquet.

priority_indicators.label: Babies between 1000-1499g who receive prophylactic CPAP
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. Birth weight exists, but CPAP support concept is not available in the current parquet.

priority_indicators.label: Eligible babies between 1500 and 1999g who receive CPAP
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. Requires both weight-band eligibility and CPAP support concepts, which are not yet available together.

priority_indicators.label: Babies with clinical jaundice who receive phototherapy
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. Clinical jaundice and phototherapy concepts are not yet available as stable report filters.

priority_indicators.label: Babies with suspected sepsis who receive parenteral antibiotics
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. Sepsis suspicion and parenteral-antibiotic treatment concepts are not yet represented in a calculable way.

priority_indicators.label: Babies not hypothermic on admission to the neonatal unit
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID indicator. Thermal-status-on-admission concept is not yet present in the current parquet.

priority_indicators.label: Babies not hypothermic at any time in the neonatal unit
priority_indicators.note: Official MNID longitudinal indicator. Requires repeated in-stay temperature capture and episode logic.

priority_indicators.label: Birth weight recorded
priority_indicators.note: Operational newborn priority retained from refactored report indicators.

priority_indicators.label: Gestation weeks recorded
priority_indicators.note: Operational newborn priority retained from refactored report indicators.

priority_indicators.label: Vitamin K given
priority_indicators.note: Operational newborn priority retained from refactored report indicators.

priority_indicators.label: Thermal care recorded
priority_indicators.note: Operational newborn priority retained from refactored report indicators.
